name: Chess
description: Play an interactive chess game. The AI can analyze board positions, suggest moves, and discuss strategy.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: start_game
tools.description: Start a new chess game. Use this when the user wants to play chess.

playerColor.description: The color the user plays as

returnType.description: The initial board state as a FEN string

tools.name: make_move
tools.description: Make a chess move on the board. Use standard algebraic notation (e.g., e4, Nf3, O-O).

move.description: The move in standard algebraic notation (e.g., e4, Nf3, Bxc6, O-O)

returnType.description: The updated board state and move result

tools.name: get_board_state
tools.description: Get the current board state. Use this when the user asks about the position or wants move suggestions.

returnType.description: Current board state including FEN, move history, and game status
